## How to Send Care Packages to Inmates
Sending an [inmate care package](https://plugforinmates.com/products?category=care_package) is simple with our 3-step process
### 1. Browse & Select Items
Browse our catalog of DOC-approved commissary items, clothing, magazines, and care packages. Filter by category or search for specific products.
### 2. Add Inmate Details & Pay
Enter your loved one's name, inmate ID, and facility. Complete your secure checkout with PayPal — we handle all facility compliance.
### 3. We Ship Directly to the Facility
Your care package is inspected, packaged per DOC regulations, and shipped directly to the correctional facility. Track delivery in real time.

## Your Trusted Partner for Inmate Care Packages and Prison Commissary Services
Sending care packages for inmates has never been easier. At Plug for Inmates, we understand the importance of staying connected with your loved ones in correctional facilities. Our comprehensive prison commissary service provides a reliable, DOC-approved solution to send care packages to inmates across the United States. Whether you're looking to send books, clothing, hygiene products, or complete survival kits, we make the process simple, secure, and fast.
### Why Choose Our Inmate Care Package Service?
When you need to send a care package to an inmate, choosing the right service provider is crucial. Our platform specializes in delivering care packages for prisoners that meet all Department of Corrections requirements. We've built our reputation on reliability, speed, and compliance with prison regulations nationwide. Every care package for inmates we deliver is carefully inspected to ensure it meets facility guidelines, giving you peace of mind that your package will reach its destination.
Our prison care packages are designed with both the sender and recipient in mind. We understand that navigating prison commissary rules can be confusing and time-consuming. That's why we handle all the compliance requirements for you. Our experienced team stays up-to-date with the latest DOC approved items and facility-specific restrictions, ensuring your inmate care packages arrive without delays or rejections.
### Comprehensive Range of Prison Commissary Products
Our prison commissary online platform offers an extensive selection of products that inmates need and appreciate. From essential hygiene products and personal care items to entertainment options like books and magazines for inmates, we stock everything required to create the perfect care package. Our inmate hygiene products include soaps, shampoos, deodorants, and dental care items—all approved for prison use.
We offer specialized categories including apparel and clothing for inmates, footwear that meets facility requirements, books for inmates ranging from educational materials to popular fiction, and comprehensive survival kits designed specifically for male and female inmates. Our tobacco products, where permitted, and cosmetics for female inmates are carefully selected to comply with institutional regulations. Whether you need a single item or a complete care package bundle, our prison supplies catalog has you covered.
### How to Send Care Packages to Inmates: Simple 3-Step Process
Wondering how to send care package to inmate? Our streamlined process makes it incredibly simple. First, browse our extensive catalog of DOC approved care packages and select the items you want to include. Our intuitive interface allows you to filter products by category, facility requirements, and budget. Second, provide your inmate's information including their full name, inmate ID number, and facility location. Our system automatically verifies that your selected items comply with that specific facility's regulations. Finally, complete your secure checkout and track your package every step of the way until it's delivered to your loved one.
Our inmate support services extend beyond just delivering packages. We offer dedicated customer support to help you navigate any questions about facility restrictions, delivery timelines, or product selections. Our team is familiar with federal prison commissary, state correctional facility requirements, and county jail regulations across all 50 states.
### Fast, Reliable Delivery to Correctional Facilities Nationwide
We pride ourselves on our rapid delivery network that serves federal prisons, state correctional facilities, county jails, and detention centers across America. Our logistics team has established relationships with facilities nationwide, ensuring that your care packages for inmates are processed quickly and efficiently. Most orders are shipped within 24-48 hours, and we provide real-time tracking so you always know where your package is in the delivery process.
Understanding that timing is important, we offer expedited shipping options for urgent needs. Whether you're sending a birthday care package, holiday supplies, or emergency items, our prison delivery service ensures your care package arrives when it matters most. We work closely with facility mailrooms to streamline the receiving process and minimize any potential delays.
